---
name: Feature request
about: Request a codec, container, filter, or CLI option
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's missing

What capability do you need? If it maps to an FFmpeg feature, name it (codec,
container, filter, or `ffmpeg`/`ffprobe` flag).

## Use case

What are you trying to do? A concrete command or workflow helps us prioritize.

## Notes

- Is this already on the [compatibility matrix](../../docs/compatibility.md) as
  planned / not-yet-implemented?
- Licensing/patent considerations, if you know of any (we keep the core
  permissively licensed and pure-Rust — see the README).
